use_cases: Display user profile images with fallback initials in social or messaging applications
Show user status indicators (online, offline, busy, away) in team collaboration dashboards
Render user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Display profile pictures in user directories or member lists
Show avatar with status in notification panels or chat interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives featuring image display with rounded corners, fallback content for loading or error states, status indicators (online/offline/busy/away) with color variants, and absolute-positioned indicators. The component uses Tailwind CSS for styling and class-variance-authority for variant management. Designed as a minimal, flat-styled component suitable for dashboards, social platforms, and messaging interfaces across SaaS, e-commerce, and general applications.
